anyOf.description: Backend image digest, or not_recorded when unavailable.

image_digest.description: Backend image digest, or not_recorded when unavailable.

source.description: Backend identity provenance. manual means the caller supplied the value as an assertion, not observed evidence.

anyOf.description: Backend version, or not_recorded when unavailable.

version.description: Backend version, or not_recorded when unavailable.

items.description: Normalized report arrays whose optional fields use these CEL defaults.

optional_boolean.description: Default value applied to absent optional boolean fields in the internal CEL input.

optional_string.description: Default value applied to absent optional string fields in the internal CEL input.

concrete_operator_family.description: Concrete normalized operator family that can appear in normalized_operators[].family.

error.description: Target availability error when status is not_evaluated because target acquisition failed.

target_id.description: Canonical target ID resolved for the contract.

source.description: Predefined or direct forbid contract rule source.

diagnostic_id.description: Diagnostic ID associated with a non-violation failure kind.

failure_kind.description: Reason class when status is fail.

matched_operator_indexes.description: PlanNode indexes from normalized_operators[].index that matched this operator-family rule.

predefined.description: Predefined contract name when this result was expanded from use.

source.description: Original contract source that produced this result, such as use/no_hash_join, forbid[0], or cel.

check_recommended.description: Whether this contract tier is recommended for --check without additional review.

reasons.description: Why this stability tier was assigned.

replayable_from_report.description: Whether the contract can be re-evaluated from the serialized YAML/JSON report alone.

environment_warnings.description: Environment warnings that affect contract interpretation.

not_evaluated.description: Number of contracts that could not be evaluated because the target plan was unavailable.

source.description: Configured or derived query source catalog.

config_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the resolved spanner-query-gen config file bytes.

contract_file_path.description: Relative plan contract file path when stable output does not omit it.

contract_file_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the resolved plan contract file bytes.

operator_tree_version.description: Normalized operator tree digest input version.

child_indexes.description: Direct child PlanNode indexes from child_links.

descendant_indexes.description: Transitive child PlanNode indexes reachable through child_links.

full_scan.description: Whether the PlanNode metadata marks a full scan.

scan_type.description: Normalized scan_type metadata, for example table_scan, index_scan, batch_scan, or search_index_scan.

spool_name.description: Raw spool_name metadata for SpoolBuild and SpoolScan operators.

subtree_family_counts.description: Complete operator family counts for this PlanNode subtree, including the operator itself. Contains every operator_family enum value; absent families are represented by 0.

aggregate.description: Count for normalized operator family aggregate.

anti_semi_apply.description: Count for normalized operator family anti_semi_apply.

apply_join.description: Count for normalized operator family apply_join.

apply_mutations.description: Count for normalized operator family apply_mutations.

array_subquery.description: Count for normalized operator family array_subquery.

array_unnest.description: Count for normalized operator family array_unnest.

blocking_operator.description: Count for normalized operator family blocking_operator.

bloom_filter_build.description: Count for normalized operator family bloom_filter_build.

change_stream_tvf.description: Count for normalized operator family change_stream_tvf.

compute.description: Count for normalized operator family compute.

compute_struct.description: Count for normalized operator family compute_struct.

create_batch.description: Count for normalized operator family create_batch.

data_block_to_row.description: Count for normalized operator family data_block_to_row.

distributed_anti_semi_apply.description: Count for normalized operator family distributed_anti_semi_apply.

distributed_cross_apply.description: Count for normalized operator family distributed_cross_apply.

distributed_merge_union.description: Count for normalized operator family distributed_merge_union.

distributed_semi_apply.description: Count for normalized operator family distributed_semi_apply.

distributed_semi_apply_internal_apply.description: Count for normalized operator family distributed_semi_apply_internal_apply.

distributed_union.description: Count for normalized operator family distributed_union.

empty_relation.description: Count for normalized operator family empty_relation.

explicit_sort.description: Count for normalized operator family explicit_sort.

full_sort.description: Count for normalized operator family full_sort.

hash_aggregate.description: Count for normalized operator family hash_aggregate.

hash_join.description: Count for normalized operator family hash_join.

join.description: Count for normalized operator family join.

key_range_accumulator.description: Count for normalized operator family key_range_accumulator.

limit.description: Count for normalized operator family limit.

merge_join.description: Count for normalized operator family merge_join.

mini_batch_assign.description: Count for normalized operator family mini_batch_assign.

mini_batch_key_order.description: Count for normalized operator family mini_batch_key_order.

minor_sort.description: Count for normalized operator family minor_sort.

push_broadcast_hash_join.description: Count for normalized operator family push_broadcast_hash_join.

random_id_assign.description: Count for normalized operator family random_id_assign.

recursive_spool_scan.description: Count for normalized operator family recursive_spool_scan.

recursive_union.description: Count for normalized operator family recursive_union.

row_count.description: Count for normalized operator family row_count.

row_to_data_block.description: Count for normalized operator family row_to_data_block.

scalar.description: Count for normalized operator family scalar.

scalar_subquery.description: Count for normalized operator family scalar_subquery.

scan.description: Count for normalized operator family scan.

search_predicate.description: Count for normalized operator family search_predicate.

search_query_conversion_tvf.description: Count for normalized operator family search_query_conversion_tvf.

semi_apply.description: Count for normalized operator family semi_apply.

serialize_result.description: Count for normalized operator family serialize_result.

spool_build.description: Count for normalized operator family spool_build.

spool_scan.description: Count for normalized operator family spool_scan.

stream_aggregate.description: Count for normalized operator family stream_aggregate.

union_all.description: Count for normalized operator family union_all.

union_input.description: Count for normalized operator family union_input.

unit_relation.description: Count for normalized operator family unit_relation.

unknown.description: Count for normalized operator family unknown.

verify_determinism.description: Count for normalized operator family verify_determinism.

operator_family.description: Normalized operator family, including derived umbrella families usable in counts and contracts.

anyOf.description: Effective optimizer statistics package observed from the backend, or not_recorded when unavailable.

statistics_package.description: Effective optimizer statistics package observed from the backend, or not_recorded when unavailable.

anyOf.description: Effective optimizer version observed from the backend, or not_recorded when unavailable.

version.description: Effective optimizer version observed from the backend, or not_recorded when unavailable.

anyOf.description: Requested optimizer statistics package passed to AnalyzeQuery, or not_pinned.

statistics_package.description: Requested optimizer statistics package passed to AnalyzeQuery, or not_pinned.

anyOf.description: Requested optimizer version passed to AnalyzeQuery, or not_pinned.

version.description: Requested optimizer version passed to AnalyzeQuery, or not_pinned.

backend.description: Runtime backend used to obtain query plans.

ddl_sha256.description: SHA-256 of resolved catalog DDL bytes.

error.description: Target acquisition error or skip message.

operator_families.description: Concrete normalized operator families observed in normalized_operators[].family. Derived umbrella families such as explicit_sort are not listed here.

operator_family_counts.description: Normalized operator family counts observed in the query plan. Contains every operator_family enum value, including derived umbrella families; absent families are represented by 0.

aggregate.description: Count for normalized operator family aggregate.

anti_semi_apply.description: Count for normalized operator family anti_semi_apply.

unit_relation.description: Count for normalized operator family unit_relation.

unknown.description: Count for normalized operator family unknown.

verify_determinism.description: Count for normalized operator family verify_determinism.

operator_tree_sha256.description: SHA-256 of normalized operator tree digest input.

optimizer_not_pinned.description: Whether this query used unpinned optimizer settings.

plan_environment_notes.description: Review notes about the plan acquisition environment.

status.description: Per-query analysis status. Status ok means plan fields are valid. Status error or skipped means only the input identity fields and error field are reliable; plan normalization fields must not be interpreted as a successful plan.

target_id.description: Canonical target ID, for example query/ListSingers or query/ExternalQuery#inner.

auto_fix.description: Remediation is advisory in v1alpha and is never applied automatically.

errors.description: Number of query targets with status error.

included_count.description: Number of query targets included in queries[]. Must equal planned + errors + skipped.

planned.description: Number of query targets with status ok.

skipped.description: Number of query targets with status skipped.

contract_evaluation_mode.description: Contract evaluation modes that require contract result fields.

backend.description: Runtime backend used to obtain query plans.

contract_evaluation_mode.description: Contract evaluation mode for this report.

contract_evaluator_version.description: Plan contract evaluator version used for contract evaluation.

contract_file_version.description: Plan contract file version used for contract evaluation.

format.description: spannerplan tree format used for rendered plan text.

render_mode.description: spannerplan render mode used for rendered plan text.

status.description: Artifact production status. This does not mean every query target was successfully planned; use target_summary and queries[].status for target-level success.
